extortion.description: afezo.nl zoominfo.com/c/aannemingsmij-afezo-bv/372576926 Afezo B.V. is a family-owned company specializing in urban sewer work and infrastructure development in Amsterdam and the Zaanstreek. With decades of experience, they offer a comprehensive range of services including wastewater management, road construction, and the development of drinking water networks. Their commitment to sustainability and innovative practices drives their projects, which aim to enhance both the physical environment and the community. Afezo serves a diverse clientele, from small-scale to large-scale projects, contributing significantly to the infrastructure of Amsterdam
